title: Agent Runner Docs-Only Smoke Test

allow: read orchestration docs and task records
create one docs-only smoke-test result file on an isolated branch
open a draft PR for the smoke-test result
deny: modify game/runtime/assets/validators outside orchestration smoke-test scope
set any game approval/runtime eligibility flag true

validation: no files outside docs/ops smoke-test result are changed
task runner reports actual branch/commit/PR identifiers

handoff.transitionCondition: After credentials are configured, run CC smoke test first; only then test Coco automation.

blocker.resolution: Configure the required GitHub Actions secret(s): ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for CC; OPENAI_API_KEY only if headless Codex automation is desired. Then transition this task to READY_FOR_CC for the first smoke test.
